projects.name: Demo Project
projects.description: A sample project to show how Mission Control works.
safetyRules: Do not deploy production without explicit approval.
Do not commit secrets or private customer data.
Do not add sensitive data collection, training, personalization, or outbound messaging without clear consent and opt-out behavior.

tasks.title: Try Mission Control locally
tasks.description: Run the app, add a project, add a task, and generate a Codex prompt.
tasks.userStory: As a project owner, I want to verify Mission Control works locally, so that I can coordinate Codex tasks from a durable board.
tasks.expectedOutcome: The local task board loads, the sample task is visible, and builder/reviewer prompts can be generated from the task detail.
acceptanceCriteria: A task can be created from the UI or CLI.
A builder prompt can be generated.
